title: Apinity Marketplace API
description: Schema representing an API registered in the Apinity compliant API marketplace

id.description: Unique identifier for the marketplace API

description.description: Description of the API and its capabilities

status.description: Lifecycle status of the API in the marketplace

compliancePolicies.description: Compliance policies applied to this API

categories.description: Categories classifying this API in the marketplace

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the API was registered in the marketplace
